description: This image displays the logo for "Land Monitoring." The logo features a stylized graphic in a light green colour on the left, enclosed by a semi-circular arc. Inside the arc, there are three abstract vertical bar-like shapes, resembling urban buildings or data bars, alongside a stylized ear of wheat or grain. To the right of this graphic, the words "Land Monitoring" are presented in two lines, stacked vertically, using a light green sans-serif font.
